column7: Promotes vigorous vegetative establishment; apply at transplanting and peak tillering stage.
Provides strong nutritional start; complete basal application reduces early-season deficiency stress.
Provides N + sulfur support for vegetative growth; effective in paddies with sulfur deficiency.
Strengthens stalk and reduces lodging risk; K improves crop standability at high yield.
Triacontanol promotes early tillering and root development; foliar spray at 2–3 WAT improves establishment.
Bacteria and fungi improve soil nutrient cycling; nano-NPK provides precise nutrition for inbred variety establishment.
Rhizosphere organic activity improves nutrient use efficiency; reduces synthetic fertilizer needs while supporting inbred yield.
Azolla provides sustainable N for inbred variety; organic matter improves soil conditions for consistent yield.
Water-soluble NPK corrects mid-season deficiency; foliar application at PI and heading supports inbred yield target.
